name: marketing-data-engine-sps
description: A complete marketing data quality engine: ingests raw prospecting data from Excel or CRM/ABM connectors, enriches missing fields via a LinkedIn Sales Navigator > Apollo > Lusha waterfall, validates it through a 12-level, 100+ point framework, scores it with a weighted Marketing Data Quality Score (MDQS), and routes Gold/Silver records to the CRM while flagging the rest for review.
